mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_reports (employee_id, report_date, work_seconds, idle_seconds, efficiency_score, ai_comment) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{reportDate}, #{workSeconds}, #{idleSeconds}, #{efficiencyScore}, #{aiComment}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE work_seconds = #{workSeconds}, idle_seconds = #{idleSeconds}, efficiency_score = #{efficiencyScore}, ai_comment = #{aiComment}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM daily_reports WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} AND report_date = #{date}
SELECT * FROM daily_reports ORDER BY report_date DESC
SELECT dr.*, e.name as employeeName, e.employee_no as employeeNo FROM daily_reports dr JOIN employees e ON dr.employee_id = e.id ORDER BY dr.report_date DESC
